## What

Brief description of the change.

## Why

What problem does this solve? Link to an issue if applicable.

## How

Outline the approach taken. Mention any design decisions or trade-offs.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated for the change
- [ ] All tests pass (`./gradlew :kap-core:jvmTest :kap-resilience:jvmTest :kap-arrow:test`)
- [ ] Codegen is up to date (if applicable)
- [ ] KDoc added for new public API
- [ ] No breaking changes to existing public API (or discussed in issue first)
